subtitles.original: …者よ
subtitles.english: ...beings

subtitles.original: 真実は あなたの胸の中にある
subtitles.english: The truth is in your heart.

subtitles.original: 嵐の海は静まった
subtitles.english: The stormy sea has calmed down.

subtitles.original: 失ったものは数えきれなくとも
subtitles.english: Even if the things lost are countless...

subtitles.original: この歌が聴こえてる
subtitles.english: Can you hear this song?

subtitles.original: 世界中の寄る辺なき者よ
subtitles.english: All helpless people in the world,

subtitles.original: 希望は あなたの胸の中にある
subtitles.english: Hope is in your heart.

subtitles.original: 悲しみの夜を超える時
subtitles.english: When crossing the night of sorrow,

subtitles.original: 必ずあなたは生きていく
subtitles.english: you will surely go on living...

subtitles.original: 強さを持てるから
subtitles.english: with the strength to survive.

subtitles.original: やった！できた！
subtitles.english: We did it! We did it!

subtitles.original: Fluffy tail! Fluffy tail!
subtitles.english: Fluffy tail! Fluffy tail!

subtitles.original: お互いのしっぽを見せ合おう！
subtitles.english: Let's show off our tails!

subtitles.original: おお、揺れてる！
subtitles.english: Whoa, sway, sway!

subtitles.original: どっちの方が長いの？ / 私の方が長いよ！
subtitles.english: Which one is longer? / Mine is longer!

subtitles.original: ハッピーバースデー、ラオーラ！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday, Raora! Happy birthday!

subtitles.original: 来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for being here!

subtitles.original: 彼女を見て！彼女を見て！
subtitles.english: Look at her! Look at her!

subtitles.original: 自己紹介しなきゃ！
subtitles.english: You should introduce yourself!

subtitles.original: あ、こんにちは！あなたは誰？この不思議な生き物は誰？
subtitles.english: Oh, hi! Who are you? Who is this mysterious creature?

subtitles.original: 耳は何個あるの？
subtitles.english: How many ears do you have?

subtitles.original: 私は不思議な生き物… / 1、2、3、4…
subtitles.english: I'm a mysterious creature... / One, two, three, four...
Four, five, six, seven... / It's four! Six, seven ears?

subtitles.original: 自己紹介してよ！
subtitles.english: Who are you? Introduce yourself!

subtitles.original: ハロー、チャットのみんな、こんにちは！私はジェリク。4つの耳を持つ狐で、ここにいる本日の主役の自称親友です！
subtitles.english: Hello, hi chat! Hi. I'm Geriku, and I am a four-eared fox and self-proclaimed best friend of the birthday girl over here!

subtitles.original: 私のこと大好きなんだよね？ / 大好きだよ！
subtitles.english: She loves me very much, doesn't she? / I love her very much!

subtitles.original: 来てくれて本当にありがとう！ / 呼んでくれてありがとう！一緒に踊れて嬉しかったよ。
subtitles.english: Yeah, thank you so much for being here! / Thank you for having me! It was so nice to dance with you.

subtitles.original: 今日はあなたにたくさんのパッションを届けに来たんだ… / パッション…
subtitles.english: I have come here today to bring you a lot of passion... / Passion...

subtitles.original: …それと、あなたが毎日美しいアートを描く時に解き放つべき、強い決意をね！
subtitles.english: ...and determination that you need to unleash when you do your beautiful art every single day!

subtitles.original: これからはもっと情熱的になるよ！
subtitles.english: I will be very passionate from now on!

subtitles.original: 今すぐ解き放ってほしいの！もう待てない、ずっと踊ってたんだから！手を貸して、手を貸して！
subtitles.english: I need you to unleash it now! I can't wait any longer, I've been dancing this whole time! Give me your hand, give me your hand!

subtitles.original: 解き放って！悪魔を呼び覚ますんだ！
subtitles.english: Unleash it! Unleash the demon!

subtitles.original: みんなごめんね、もう行かなきゃ。見てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Sorry guys, I have to go now. Thank you so much for watching!

subtitles.original: いや、まだだよ！私の人生を続けるんだ！ / みんな本当にありがとう！バイバイ！
subtitles.english: No, not yet! You will continue my life! / Thank you so much everyone! I'm going to leave you.

subtitles.original: 行かせないよ！置いてかないで！ / 置いていくよ！…次の曲のダンスは知ってる？
subtitles.english: No, she won't! Don't leave me! / I'm going to leave you! ...Do you know the dances for the next song?

subtitles.original: すごく楽しいから、あなたも… / 私も？参加してほしいの？
subtitles.english: It's going to be very fun. You should... / I... You want me to join?

subtitles.original: そうそう！いや、今すぐライブをやらなきゃ。本番だよ！ / 今すぐ生でやらなきゃいけないの？！
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah! No, no, you have to do the live now. It's live! / I have to do it live now?!

subtitles.original: 準備はいい？よし、いつでもいけるよ。やろう！ / イエス！うわぁ！
subtitles.english: Ready? All right, I'm ready. Let's do it! / Yes! Whoa!

subtitles.original: よし！決意を解き放つんだ！そうだ、そうだ、踊れ、踊れ、踊れ！
subtitles.english: Yes! Unleash the determination! Yes, yes, yes, dance, dance, dance, dance!

subtitles.original: そして今度は、バースデーガールの番だよ！ / うわぁ、ちょっと待って！
subtitles.english: And now, birthday girl time! / Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa!

subtitles.original: わぁ！ヘイヘイヘイ！
subtitles.english: Whoa! Hey, hey, hey!

subtitles.original: 見ちゃった！見ちゃったよ！ / 見、見ちゃダメだよ！見えた？
subtitles.english: I saw that! I saw that! / You can... you can't see that! Did you see that?

subtitles.original: 私は見ちゃったよ。 / 見てないよ！ステージからやるべきだよ。
subtitles.english: Because I saw it. / No, you didn't see it! You should do it from the stage.

subtitles.original: まあ、一緒にお風呂（温泉）に入ったんだから、全部見ただろ。これ以上見なくていいよ！
subtitles.english: Well, we've been to onsen together, you... you saw everything. You don't have to see anything else!

subtitles.original: なんて乱暴なの！でもいいよ、素晴らしい！決意が現れてる、パッションが…
subtitles.english: Oh god, you're so violent! That's good, that's good! The determination is coming out, the passion is...

subtitles.original: …パッションがここに！あぁ、情熱！ / 全てのパッション！情熱的になるよ！
subtitles.english: ...the passion is here! Oh, the passion! / All the passion! I'll be passionate!

subtitles.original: その調子でお願い。テンションMAXだからさ。リラックスして。無理だよ。
subtitles.english: The passion, please. I'm hype max, please. Relax. I can't do that.

subtitles.original: おいで、おいで、おばあちゃん。こっち来て。 / あぁ、いいよ。おしゃべりしたいんだね。絶対おしゃべりしたいんだ。
subtitles.english: Oh, come here, come here, grandma. Come here. / Ah, this is okay. She wants to talk. She definitely wants to talk.

subtitles.original: 私がおしゃべりしたいの？何について話したい？
subtitles.english: I want to talk? What do you want to talk about?

subtitles.original: あなたが話したがってるって言ったの。 / 話したいよ。 / 私をおばあちゃんって呼んだね。よくもそんなことを！
subtitles.english: I said, you want to talk. / I want to talk. / You called me grandma. How freaking dare you?

subtitles.original: よくも言ったな！ちょっと、私のこと「自称」って呼んだでしょ…
subtitles.english: How freaking dare you! Hey, you called me self-proclaimed...

subtitles.original: この動き、全部私がやったんだからね。クレイジーなダンスを全部。そうそうそう。
subtitles.english: All these moves, I pulled out, you know. All the crazy dances. Yeah, yeah, yeah.

subtitles.original: 本当に大変なダンスだったよね？すっごく難しかった。
subtitles.english: Right, that was such a tough dance, wasn't it? Oh, it was so hard.

subtitles.original: 彼女が誕生日祝いでディナーをごちそうしてくれるんだって！ / そう、私の誕生日！
subtitles.english: She's going to treat me for dinner to celebrate her birthday! / Yeah, it's my birthday!

subtitles.original: そうそうそう。あなたが…あなたがディナーをごちそうしてくれるべきだよ。 / 何を買ってくれるの？何を用意してくれる？
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes. You should... you should treat me for dinner. / What are you going to get for me? What are you going to get for me?

subtitles.original: 実は… / 何をくれるのかな？楽しみだな。
subtitles.english: Actually... / What are you going to get for me? Good points here.

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Synthesis**

Alright, let's break this down. My task is to generate synchronized subtitles for this video segment, and it's all about precise alignment. I'm focusing on the *audio* – it's the absolute truth, so I'll be listening and transcribing. I've got to ignore the reference JSON if the audio deviates, and there's no room for closed captioning frills or long lines.

First, the song portion. I'm carefully listening to "The Everlasting Guilty Crown," matching the lyrics to the audio onset/offset down to the millisecond. It's final chorus and bridge, and I have the time codes, so let's make sure it matches the song from the reference. The trick here is that the reference has the lyrics, so I can match them directly. I'll translate them if needed as well, but the key is accurate timing, especially those vocalizations.

Then, there's the conversation. This means meticulously transcribing every word, every phrase, every reaction. I'll need to hear what Geriku and Raora are actually saying and align the text. I'll translate the original language, but the focus is precise timing.

I've got a system. I'm listening to the audio, parsing the timecodes, and analyzing the lyrics in the JSON. I'm making sure each subtitle entry (`og` and `en`) starts and ends at the correct timestamps. No overlaps, no gaps. Each line stays within the length limit.

For the song, I've confirmed timestamps of all the lyrics:
  * "者よ" at 00:00.000 to 00:01.300
  * "真実は あなたの胸の中にある" at 00:01.300 to 00:05.200
  * etc.

After the song section, it's just a matter of matching the spoken word to timecodes. So, for example:
  * 01:20.500 - 01:25.000: "やった！できた！" becomes "We did it! We did it!"
  * 01:25.500 - 01:27.800: "Fluffy tail! Fluffy tail!"
  * etc.

Then, I've got a complete list of what is said at what time with both the original language and its translation. I'll output that in the specific format, and I'll make sure it looks perfect. No errors. No deviations. Just perfect subs.
